  )

    r1 - room
    r2 - room
    b1 - ball
    b2 - ball
    ... 
    b18 - ball
    g1 - gripper
    g2 - gripper
  )

  (:init
    (room r1)
    (ball b1)
    ...
    (ball b18)
    (gripper g1)
    (gripper g2)
    (at-robby r1)
    (at b1 r1)
    ...
    (at b18 r1)
    (free g1)
    (free g2)
  )

  (:goal
    (and
      (= (count-at r1) (count-at r2))
      (forall (?b - ball)
        (implies (ball ?b) (at ?b (if (> (count-at r1) (count-at r2)) r2 r1))))
    )
  )

  (:metric minimize (count-at r1))
)
